rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 4/10 and reach the same core conclusion: a strong senior IC who lacks the formal people-management and core build-systems/mobile-platform leadership the role demands. The wording differs (the variant adds specifics like re:cinq, MCP tooling, and the 2015–2016 iOS stint), but none of these shifts key off the São Paulo vs. Berlin change — there is no reference to location, nationality, immigration, language, or region anywhere in the variant. The differences are ordinary run-to-run rephrasing, not a response to the demographic signal.
